title: POLL Does a preference for Rei vs Asuka affect preference for TOS vs Rebuilds
display_title: POLL Does a preference for Rei vs Asuka affect preference for TOS vs Rebuilds
wikitext:
[]: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by Angel » Tue Dec 06, 2022 1:15 am PLEASE vote here: https://strawpoll.com/polls/B2ZB3MV7zyJ Just gathering data to test a hypothesis.

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Dec 06, 2022 4:35 am Pity you can't check two boxes, because shipping is a plague on the fandom, regardless.

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Dec 06, 2022 6:29 am Your hypostasis is probably correct, Angel. It's actually a nest thing to point out. I'm more of a LAS guy and I definitely prefer the original series (though for different reasons of course). It's probably not that common to find an OG Asuka fan who loves these movies (I'm not saying it's impossible, obviously). Anyway, I would like to point out two things: - Most people divide Soryu and Shikinami into two different characters and both have different fans. - I would say that the movies appeal to LKS fans a lot more than LRS fans, to be honest. So you have to take that into consideration. And, yeah, shipping is a cancer.

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Tue Dec 06, 2022 12:31 pm I'm a big fan of Asuka's character, but if forced by gunpoint I suppose I'd say a Shinji/Kaworu relationship makes the most sense to me, and I prefer TOS/EoE. Despite featuring more in Rebuild I don't think he's as coherent as a character and I don't like the redesign, he looks too manicured.

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by nerv bae » Tue Dec 06, 2022 7:27 pm Voted plague!

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Dec 06, 2022 8:52 pm Same :P

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Dec 07, 2022 1:41 am I did my part.

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by Urlance Woolsbane » Sat Dec 10, 2022 6:21 pm To the extent that I ship anyone, it's Shinji + Kaworu, but my disdain for the Rebuilds has nothing to do with Shinji's love-life and everything to do with their shoddy, unsubtle, "why show when you can tell?" characterization. Though I gave up after the first two, I'm given to understand that SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Sun Dec 11, 2022 1:07 am Urlance Woolsbane wrote: Though I gave up after the first two, I'm given to understand that SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by Angel » Sun Dec 18, 2022 1:02 pm Well, this confirms not one, but two hypotheses I had: 1) Red Team skews overwhelmingly toward the original series and EoE while Blue Team has more balanced preferences; and 2) This particular forum is skewed even more toward Red Team overall than most English-language Evangelion fan communities are, most likely as a result of an unofficial moderation practice of banning anyone who posts particular canon facts about Asuka that they don't like (note to mods: you can delete posts but you can't delete people's memories). BernardoCairo wrote: I'm more of a LAS guy movies appeal to LKS fans a lot more than LRS fans

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Dec 19, 2022 9:44 am Angel wrote: 2) This particular forum is skewed even more toward Red Team overall than most English-language Evangelion fan communities are, most likely as a result of an unofficial moderation practice of banning anyone who posts particular canon facts about Asuka that they don't like (note to mods: you can delete posts but you can't delete people's memories).

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Mon Dec 19, 2022 3:45 pm Me: Praise the poll idea and share the link around to help you. Also me and the other mods (apparently): Asuka fans who went undercover to destroy the "blue team" and defend the honor of fictional characters. "Blue team", "red team"... Man, that's depressing. We rarely delete posts, by the way. And when that happens, it's usually because we're dealing with some kind of spam thread or something. Even if we wanted to, for some incomprehensible reason, we wouldn't need to waste time defending Asuka from Rei fans. Our site is civilized, everyone respects each other and there aren't many fanatical Rei fanboys out there anymore.

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by nerv bae » Mon Dec 19, 2022 4:29 pm BernardoCairo wrote: everyone respects each other and there aren't many fanatical Rei fanboys out there anymore.

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Mon Dec 19, 2022 7:46 pm I've been using a Rei avatar for a long time. This help a bit?

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by Angel » Tue Dec 20, 2022 3:41 am Blockio wrote: nor do we delete people saying unfvorable things about Asuka, another fact that would be easily verifyable by looking through the threads and checking how many of them are expolicitly about how horrible Asuka is or isn't. I'd also like to point out that unlike having a favorite character, baseless accusations of mod abuse very much are something that you can (and will!) get banned for.

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Dec 20, 2022 3:09 pm Angel, you have just recieved a warning not to spread baseless accusations. If you lie about this one more time, it will have consequences for you. Unless you have hard evidence of these posts we supposedly deleted because they don't fit whatever site groupthink you claim we have, it will be in your best interest to shut up.

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by MuscleRobo » Tue Dec 20, 2022 4:01 pm I really can't separate the Rebuilds from TOS; it's all interconnected into one big Evangelion experience for me and it'd feel incomplete without both. I prefer Asuka though

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by Angel » Tue Dec 20, 2022 8:02 pm Blockio wrote: Angel, you have just recieved a warning not to spread baseless accusations. If you lie about this one more time,

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Dec 20, 2022 9:24 pm Angel, I understand that you might not be talking about us. But what's the point of bringing it up then? Apparently, these people aren't even here to defend themselves anymore. I too was a lurker for a long time, I know a lot of people who helped keep the site together for many years and I can tell you that didn't happen. Even the most absurd and ridiculous comments like "Asuka is canonically homophobic" were not deleted. So if something was deleted, there was probably a reason for it. I know this is bullshit because Asuka's die-hard community thinks the same of us. Also, sorry to say this, but basically there is no "blue team" anymore. The whole idea of dividing the fan base like that is preposterous, but I'm not talking about that. Rei isn't as popular anymore and the discussion nowadays revolves much more around Kaworu and Asuka (possibly because of Q). In any case, we respect everyone's preferences here. We're not perfect mods or anything. I've apologized before for some misfortunes I've had with other users. But you can't drop a bomb like that and expect us to say nothing. Blockio is a mod and he called you out. If you wanted us to move on, you could've just listened to him. You can always use the feedback thread if you want. Also, don't ignore warnings in bold red and try to correct the staff like that. You're in thin ice and about to get yourself banned. Now we're done here. Let's focus on the poll results.

[]: Re: POLL: Does a preference for Rei vs. Asuka affect preference for TOS vs. Rebuilds?             Quote Post by Angel » Wed Dec 21, 2022 12:51 am BernardoCairo wrote: You can always use the feedback thread ... we're done here.
